name: @xpert-ai/sandbox-runtime
description: Versioned OCI image suite for Xpert Sandbox workloads.

scripts.install:ai: playwright-core install chromium chromium-headless-shell && node scripts/install-ai-resources.mjs --catalog images/browser-ai/resources/resource-catalog.json
scripts.install:video: playwright-core install chromium chromium-headless-shell && node scripts/install-local-video.mjs && node scripts/verify-local-video.mjs
